nodes.name: Yellow-eyed junco
nodes.summary: Yellow-eyed junco（Yellow-eyed junco，学名 Junco phaeonotus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于Pine–oak forest，常见栖息地包括灌丛。

nodes.name: Pine–oak forest
nodes.summary: Pine–oak forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联32种鸟类，包括Mottled owl、白喉蓝头鹊、小蓝头鹊等32种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It primarily inhabits pine and pine-oak forest and also scrublands and brushy pastures and fields in the upper subtropical and temperate zones. Sources are in general agreement on its elevational range

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It primarily inhabits pine and pine-oak forest and also scrublands and brushy pastures and fields in the upper subtropical and temperate zones. Sources are in general agreement on its elevational range
